description: Immutable NZ scopes for RuleSpec-NZ: the 2026-06-16 PCO statute and regulation scopes and the 2026-07-18 Wellington district-plan scope carried unchanged, plus the 2026-07-19 PCO supplement scopes (Veterans' Support Act 2014, Taxation (Budget Measures) Act 2025, Social Assistance Legislation (AS and IRR) Amendment Act 2025; Parental Leave and Employment Protection Regulations 2016, Housing Restructuring and Tenancy Matters (Prescribed Elements of Calculation Mechanism) Regulations 2018).
name: nz-rulespec-2026-07-19
